title: fence-agents bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.10.0-98]
- fence_aws: add 'skip_os_shutdown' parameter to allow hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-7601

[4.10.0-97]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107505

[4.10.0-96]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2025-47273
  Resolves: RHEL-95901

[4.10.0-95]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-82193

[4.10.0-92]
- fence_sbd: improve error handling
  Resolves: RHEL-13088

[4.10.0-91]
- fence_ibm_powervs: fix plaintext token file support
  Resolves: RHEL-88568

[4.10.0-90]
- fence_nutanix_ahv: new fence agent
  Resolves: RHEL-68321

[4.10.0-88]
- fence_compute/fence_evacuate: dont use deprecated inspect.getargspec()
  Resolves: RHEL-84448
- fence_sbd: get devices from SBD_DEVICE env variable if devices
  parameter isnt set
  Resolves: RHEL-79798

[4.10.0-87]
- fence_ibm_vpc: refresh bearer-token if token data is corrupt, and
  avoid edge-case of writing empty token file
  Resolves: RHEL-83255
full_text:
[4.10.0-98]
- fence_aws: add 'skip_os_shutdown' parameter to allow hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-7601

[4.10.0-97]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107505

[4.10.0-96]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2025-47273
  Resolves: RHEL-95901

[4.10.0-95]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-82193

[4.10.0-92]
- fence_sbd: improve error handling
  Resolves: RHEL-13088

[4.10.0-91]
- fence_ibm_powervs: fix plaintext token file support
  Resolves: RHEL-88568

[4.10.0-90]
- fence_nutanix_ahv: new fence agent
  Resolves: RHEL-68321

[4.10.0-88]
- fence_compute/fence_evacuate: dont use deprecated inspect.getargspec()
  Resolves: RHEL-84448
- fence_sbd: get devices from SBD_DEVICE env variable if devices
  parameter isnt set
  Resolves: RHEL-79798

[4.10.0-87]
- fence_ibm_vpc: refresh bearer-token if token data is corrupt, and
  avoid edge-case of writing empty token file
  Resolves: RHEL-83255

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20655-0.html
